targets.queryText: SELECT CAST(CAST(unixepoch(received_at)/60 AS INT)*60 AS REAL)*1000 as time, MAX(CASE WHEN zone='zone-a' THEN temp END) as "zone-a", MAX(CASE WHEN zone='zone-b' THEN temp END) as "zone-b", MAX(CASE WHEN zone='zone-c' THEN temp END) as "zone-c" FROM temperature WHERE label='S1_center_10cm' AND unixepoch(received_at) >= $__from/1000 AND unixepoch(received_at) <= $__to/1000 GROUP BY CAST(unixepoch(received_at)/60 AS INT) ORDER BY time

targets.queryText: SELECT CAST(CAST(unixepoch(received_at)/60 AS INT)*60 AS REAL)*1000 as time, MAX(CASE WHEN zone='zone-a' AND label='S1_center_10cm' THEN temp END) as "A_10cm", MAX(CASE WHEN zone='zone-a' AND label='S2_center_25cm' THEN temp END) as "A_25cm", MAX(CASE WHEN zone='zone-a' AND label='S3_center_40cm' THEN temp END) as "A_40cm", MAX(CASE WHEN zone='zone-b' AND label='S1_center_10cm' THEN temp END) as "B_10cm", MAX(CASE WHEN zone='zone-b' AND label='S2_center_25cm' THEN temp END) as "B_25cm", MAX(CASE WHEN zone='zone-b' AND label='S3_center_40cm' THEN temp END) as "B_40cm", MAX(CASE WHEN zone='zone-c' AND label='S1_center_10cm' THEN temp END) as "C_10cm", MAX(CASE WHEN zone='zone-c' AND label='S2_center_25cm' THEN temp END) as "C_25cm", MAX(CASE WHEN zone='zone-c' AND label='S3_center_40cm' THEN temp END) as "C_40cm" FROM temperature WHERE label IN ('S1_center_10cm','S2_center_25cm','S3_center_40cm') AND unixepoch(received_at) >= $__from/1000 AND unixepoch(received_at) <= $__to/1000 GROUP BY CAST(unixepoch(received_at)/60 AS INT) ORDER BY time

targets.queryText: SELECT zone, bus_v, sd_status, wifi_attempts, uptime_min, received_at FROM device_status WHERE received_at = (SELECT MAX(received_at) FROM device_status ds2 WHERE ds2.zone = device_status.zone) ORDER BY zone
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT zone, bus_v, sd_status, wifi_attempts, uptime_min, received_at FROM device_status WHERE received_at = (SELECT MAX(received_at) FROM device_status ds2 WHERE ds2.zone = device_status.zone) ORDER BY zone
